issues.description: Condition missing LeaderHasType check for {Blackbeard Pirates}. Current condition only checks for Fullalead on board but does not verify Leader type requirement stated in card text.

Rest action targets Self, but card text specifies 'rest 1 of your [Fullalead] cards' — target should be a Fullalead card, not Self. The character gaining power is Self, but the Rest action applies to a Fullalead.

suggestedDsl.effectText:
[Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may rest 1 of your [Fullalead] cards: If your Leader has the {Blackbeard Pirates} type, this Character gains +4000 power during this turn.
[On K.O.] Draw 1 card.
